title: ICAI Invites Public Comments on Revised Stipend for Articled Assistants & CA Regulations
content:
# ICAI Invites Public Comments on Revised Stipend for Articled Assistants & CA Regulations

Ek important update hai for all CA stakeholders! The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) ne proposed stipend rates for Articled Assistants aur draft amendments to the Chartered Accountants Regulations, 1988 par public comments invite kiye hain.

Ministry of Corporate Affairs (MCA) ne in proposed changes ko already in-principle approval de diya hai.

Yahaan kuch key details hain:

*   **What's Proposed:** Revisions in the minimum monthly stipend payable to articled assistants, especially those undergoing 2 years of practical training under the New Scheme of Education & Training. Draft amendments to Regulation 48 of the Chartered Accountants Regulations, 1988, are also on the table.
*   **Gazette Publication:** The draft notification was published in Part III Section 4 of the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, dated 25th June, 2026.
*   **Purpose:** ICAI is seeking objections and suggestions from all affected persons before finalizing these regulations.
*   **Deadline for Comments:** Aap apne suggestions/objections 5th August, 2026 tak submit kar sakte hain. This 30-day window started from 4th July, 2026, when the Gazette notification was made public.
*   **How to Submit:** Comments can be submitted through a dedicated Google Form provided by ICAI.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://resource.cdn.icai.org/93090boso-aps5752-gazette-notification.pdf)

*Published on: 8 July 2026*
